project_acceptance.observable: The shared policy redacts access_token with exact case-insensitive matching.
Near-name keys, adapters, and existing secret behavior do not regress.

tasks.objective: Extend the shared exact-key secret set with access_token.

context_refs.claim: One shared set controls exact case-insensitive matches at all recursive depths.
Policy belongs in sanitize, not in an adapter.

acceptance.observable: Only the shared secret-key policy changes in production code.

tasks.objective: Cover nested and case-variant access tokens plus preserved near-name keys through shared and adapter calls.

context_refs.claim: The existing suite covers shared behavior and adapter delegation.
format_event delegates to sanitize and requires no policy branch.

must_preserve: access_token_hint and token_type retain their values

acceptance.observable: All tests pass with exact-match and preservation cases asserted.

tasks.handoff: Report the one production policy edit and test result.

assumptions.statement: Casefolded set membership is the repository's established key-matching mechanism.
